files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,82 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "argo-events-1068-problem-with-setting-sqs-queue",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo-events: Problem with setting SQS queue ",
+    "description": "Problem with setting SQS queue . This issue affects 10+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify argo-events troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your argo-events deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events -n argo-events --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo-events configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo-events configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nkubectl get configmap -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-events\n```\nWe are creating EventSource on EKS k8s cluster that should consume from SQS\n\n**To Reproduce**\nSteps to reproduce the behavior:\n```apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1\nkind: EventSource\nmetadata:\n  name: aws-sqs\nspec:\n  sqs:\n    sqs-git:\n      jsonBody:"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Problem with setting SQS queue ",
+        "description": "Secrets edited by tools like `vim` always have an invisible `\\n` in the end, and it is often neglected by the user, however this makes differences for some of the applications. We trim that `\\n` to avoid issues.\n\nAlso upgraded `go-git` package to the latest.\r\n\nMight fix: #1068 as well.\n```yaml\nwe also have aws secrets as in the example:\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade argo-events to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade argo-events:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade argo-events argo-events/argo-events --namespace argo-events\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-events\nhelm list -n argo-events\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Problem with setting SQS queue  is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events -n argo-events --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n argo-events --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Secrets edited by tools like `vim` always have an invisible `\\n` in the end, and it is often neglected by the user, however this makes differences for some of the applications. We trim that `\\n` to avoid issues.\n\nAlso upgraded `go-git` package to the latest.\r\n\nMight fix: #1068 as well.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "we also have aws secrets as in the example:",
+        "is repeated few times before this error. I did also added env `DEBUG_LOG:true ` but log looks same as before. \n\nWhat i also did is entered `aws-sqs-eventsource` pod with some hack [https://github.com/kubernetes-retired/contrib/blob/master/scratch-debugger/debug.sh] and i did checked AWS credentials:"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "argo-events",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "argo-events"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Secret"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-events/issues/1068",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-events",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-events/pull/1146"
+    },
+    "reactions": 10,
+    "comments": 23,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-events installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-14T06:17:19.713Z",
